header: Test vectors of type ChunkedEncryption are meant for the decryption of Cobblestone-256 (c2sp.org/chunked-encryption) messages
See doc/c2sp_chunked_encryption.md for details on how to apply these test vectors.

ChunkReordering.description: Encrypted chunks were reordered or duplicated. The per-chunk nonce derivation must cause decryption to fail.

CounterRollover.description: The message is long enough that the chunk counter XOR'd into the nonce crosses a byte boundary. Implementations with an incorrect counter encoding may fail to decrypt this valid message.

HeaderFailure.description: The ciphertext must be rejected while processing the header (because of its length, the key size, or the commitment check), before any chunk is decrypted. aeadKey and baseNonce are omitted, and raw mode does not apply.

InvalidKeySize.description: The input key length doesn't match the AEAD key size, and must be rejected.

ModifiedCiphertext.description: Part of the ciphertext (a chunk body, an authentication tag, the salt, or the commitment) was modified. Decryption must fail.

PartialPlaintext.description: The ciphertext is invalid, but it starts with validly encrypted chunks: msgLength and msgSha512 describe the longest valid message prefix. Streaming implementations may produce that prefix before detecting the error, but must eventually fail and keep failing.

TrailingData.description: The ciphertext has extra data (garbage bytes or even a validly encrypted chunk) after the short final chunk. Decryption must fail.

Truncation.description: The ciphertext has an invalid (e.g. truncated) length: it may be missing part of the header, part of a chunk, an authentication tag, or the required short final chunk. Decryption must fail.

ValidFinalChunk.description: The ciphertext is invalid, but its final chunk is validly encrypted at the correct index: authenticating the message length by decrypting the final chunk (e.g. to seek from the end) may succeed. It must fail for all other invalid vectors.

WrongContext.description: A valid ciphertext decrypted with a different context: the commitment check must reject it before any chunk is decrypted.

WrongKey.description: A valid ciphertext decrypted with a different key: the commitment check must reject it before any chunk is decrypted.
